item.description:
What’s new in 0.2.3

  • New: Pexels stock photo picker in the image panel — search and apply free photos with one tap
  • New: Sitemap orphan warnings with one-click Fix with Site Doctor
  • Fixed: Image overlay no longer glitches the canvas while adjusting tint
  • Fixed: Overlay settings read back correctly after reselecting an image
  • Fixed: Section reorder and Remove revert the preview when they cannot be saved
  • Fixed: False orphan warnings while the sitemap is still mapping page links
  • Improved: Canvas snapshots prioritize visible pages; breakpoint mirrors stay current after edits
